steps.code: <?php require '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $u = get_user_by('login','testuser'); if (!$u) { $id = wp_create_user('testuser','Test@12345','test@example.com'); update_user_meta($id,'first_name','Test'); update_user_meta($id,'last_name','Customer'); $u = get_userdata($id); $u->set_role('customer'); wp_update_user($u); update_user_meta($id,'kwtsms_phone','96598765432'); } update_option('woocommerce_store_pages_only','no'); update_option('woocommerce_coming_soon','no'); $cod = get_option('woocommerce_cod_settings',[]); $cod['enabled']='yes'; update_option('woocommerce_cod_settings',$cod); $bacs = get_option('woocommerce_bacs_settings',[]); $bacs['enabled']='yes'; update_option('woocommerce_bacs_settings',$bacs); $pid = wp_insert_post(['post_title'=>'D5 Test Product','post_status'=>'publish','post_type'=>'product']); if ($pid) { update_post_meta($pid,'_price','19.99'); update_post_meta($pid,'_regular_price','19.99'); update_post_meta($pid,'_stock_status','instock'); update_post_meta($pid,'_manage_stock','no'); wp_set_object_terms($pid,'simple','product_type'); } $classic_id = wp_insert_post(['post_title'=>'Classic Checkout','post_status'=>'publish','post_type'=>'page','post_content'=>'[woocommerce_checkout]']); update_option('woocommerce_checkout_page_id',$classic_id); echo 'setup ok pid:'.$pid.' checkout:'.$classic_id; ?>
